parsed.clarification_question: Which primary focus would you like for this paragraph: (A) sentence-level writing polish and clarity (R1.6), (B) logical/argument consistency and evidence-claim alignment with overclaim checks (R1.2/R1.3), or (C) higher-level reframing and section-level structure suggestions (R1.1/R1.5)?
